channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliat… — 11 replies — 28.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliat…

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-23 21:30 UTC

OP

remember when linkies had hope. now all they have is PAIN. lmao and don't forget the misery. dabble on a little humiliation as well. and last but not least: incel rage hahahahhahaah

Early replies (first 3)

62015997
yikes

62016663
>>62015997
>yIkEs

62016952
Adem. He won

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62016958
>>62015802
linkies? more like stinkies lol

62016976
>>62015802
Why do you think about LINK all day, every day? Oh that's right, you're a link baggie too.
Kek baggie

62017387
>>62015802
Anon, just so you know that one of the reason I'm still holding this piece of shit LINK is you. The day you stop posting here I am selling. You give me hopium. Thanks.

62017472
>>62015802
The whole market is down stupid

62018502
I HATE ALL FREAKIN STIIIIIINKS and will forever more

62022852
bumparino :}

62022933
>>62015802
Lmao how long have you been posting this by now..

62023622
stinkies are coping with FOLDERS now :} the patheticness speaks for itself

item.title: Project /wfh/Chad — 6 replies — 19.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Project /wfh/Chad

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-03-23 21:35 UTC

OP

>woke up too early on Saturday morning and couldn't get back to sleep
>weekend followed the same habit I've built up
>went jogging first thing on Saturday
>weighed myself and reached a new low
>went to McDonald's and had an egg mcmuffin for the third week in a row and third time ever; it was ok
>drank mcBlack coffee in the car and read a few chapters of a long and boring book
>went walking for an hour while listening to podcasts
>habit is to eat nothing on Fridays and binge on Saturdays; ate chocolate and sweets and cappuccino in car
>drove around, bought another warm milk coffee and read more
>went to gym and used cycling machine but I was low energy so it maybe wasn't worth it
>went to KFC
>ate chocolate, skittles, ice cream, and popcorn at home
>slept
>woke up too early on Sunday
>everythingstential crisis hit
>was productive for 45 minutes and then tried to play final fantasy in a carefree way but couldn't last mrke than an hour before restlessness kicked in
>went for a pointless walk
>ruminated on whether to apply for other jobs or not
>drove, drank coffee in car, read more
>went to gym and weightlifting went well
>ate at burger king then vegetables at home
>now 9 pm
>currently wasting the rest of the evening

Saturday is always sunny and Sunday always has the dullest cloud of all time.

Early replies (first 3)

62017402
Fast food is so gross. Don’t know how people can still eat it now that they’re only hiring dirty people.

62018072
>>62017402
chickfila and five guys are goated. Chipotle is meh and the rest like burger king wendys are gutter tier disgusting.

62022334
>>62018072
Chick fil A is very good, even if slightly overrated. Props to them for consistency though.

Five guys is too messy and overpriced.

In N Out honestly is great but they generally are not available where I live.

Steak and Shake is low quality and bad service

Whataburger used to be good but is slowly dropping in quality ever since PE acquisition.

Underrated: Culver's, Braum's, A&W (the Papa Burger is goated)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62022337
>ITT: fat fucks obsessing over fast food slop

62023500
>>62022334
>Braum's
God dang why is Braum's so good? And it's also cheaper than the competition near me.

62023640
i don't know shit about anything except this: the more fast food I eat, the shittier I feel. OP you may be losing weight while eating that way, but i guarantee you aren't going to feel good while doing it. You're nutrient deficient. You're drinking too much coffee. And you know those weird poops you're having are a direct result of all the shit you're pouring down your gullet. You need to snap out of it bro.

item.title: IMPENDING FINANCIAL RESET!!!! AAAAAHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!! — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
IMPENDING FINANCIAL RESET!!!! AAAAAHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-23 21:39 UTC

OP

What are we supposed to do again? I can't remember what people said since it was a while ago. You know the whole reevaluate gold, clarity act, genius act trick that's going to get rid of the US debt? It seems like the Iran conflict is the opening to the transition. Some pointers/help anyone? Are we supposed to just buy bitcoin, lol

Early replies (first 3)

62023495
>>62023480
Idk, people keep saying "trust the plan," but they never say what that plan is. I'm starting to think it's another retarded /biz/ buzz word, and it really is every man for himself. Buying gold and burying it personally seems rational.

62023499
Just dance, gonna be ok

62023655
>>62023495
They're definitely intentionally demolishing the petro dollar right now. I think we have until the China Summit next month.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore. — 30 replies — 55.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-03-23 21:20 UTC

OP

Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.
>at the $15 million and up price point the preference is doorman style apartment buildings, especially if this is a residence and not an investment
Why?

Early replies (first 3)

62013834
Tartaria..

62013851
>>62013830
All the ultra luxury housing in NY is speculative investment. No one lives in those fancy new high rises much less in these "mansions".

62013855
why don't the sellers lower the price

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62013874
>nobody wants to buy
Plenty of people want to buy, they just don't want to lower the price
>I know what I have

62014099
>>62013830
>live in NYC mansion
>ride subway to get anywhere
>get stabbed by monkeys
If you have money there are 15 million better places to live.

62014132
why are people not lining up for the nyc mansions? do they truly prefer 300sqft studios?
it's hard to understand people. a mystery really

62014160
>>62013830
Panic room sure was a movie.

62014163
Security.

62014184
For people with that much money, jurisdiction matters more than location.

62014197
>>62013830
Give me $50M and I'll buy one

62014199
>>62014169
rich liberals love the hustle and the bustle
doubt theres any bums loitering around there

62014207
>>62014197
If someone gives you $50M now, you will try to gamble it on shitcoins, you know, to double it. And lose it all to a DEX scam.

62014208
>>62014169
>>62014099
Trying to decide if I want to explain or if I just trust my instincts that these are Israeli glowies.

62014566
>>62013830
> old
> over priced
> falling apart
> require substantial renovations
> cheaper and better options available pretty much anywhere else
> crowded, high property tax area
it really is a mystery isn't it?

62014765
>>62013830
N.

62015476
NYC is a brasil-level shithole to europeans these days. We’d rather livd in the hustle and bustle of our own european cities.

62015477
>>62014099
Yeah exactly, to european standards the metro is fucking ancient and in a very decayed condition.

62015485
>>62014199
Read >>62015476 there are way better cities for hustle and bustle these days. Somehow despite americans living in hyper violent cities with poor infrastructure, their night life is pretty tame and behind in trends compared to europe’s big cities.

62015603
>>62013830
looks like some gangbangers could easily kill you with a driveby shooting and you already put a target on your back buying it

62015736
>>62013874
This, likely. Boomers are in denial that no one can afford their overpriced real estate.

62015742
New york city is really, really crowded. It's hard to move around, either walking, driving, or subway. With that swell comes a lot of noise, dirt, and unpleasant encounters with foreigners.

62018124
>>62014169
Jewyorkers like to visit art galeries, go to theatre, concerts, trendy bars, nightclubs, restaurants...

62018156
>>62018124
Those are literally everywhere.

62022891
Why do chuds laser-focus on the least violent city in the US to talk about crime? NYC is famously much safer than other metros.

62022913
>>62014169
>"New york is the best city in the world"
-someone who's never been to like Tokyo or barcelona or Hong kong or ...

62022968
>>62015742
>really, really crowded
Lol have you been there at all in the past 6 years? There's nobody there except the poors that couldn't afford to leave. Everybody that's still there was just faking it until they made it, which is incredibly shitty advice that stopped being useful 20 years ago. The bridge and tunnel crowd is the only thing keeping it from going under.

62022987
>>62013830
>why aren't richfags buying mansions in a city where the mayor explicitly wants to tax them (and everyone else) to death?!?

62023570
>>62013830
Why is that image so weirdly dark?

62023591
>>62023570
op blocked by the paywall below

62023592
>>62023570
Socio-economic factors.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 101 replies — 47.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 101 • Updated: 2026-03-23 19:45 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61998660
>>61932834

This shit is going to 100 dollars isnt it

61998672
>>61997626
Oh shit anon. We should've told you that if YOU buy then it's going to 0$. You should sell and then after you sell we'll GIGA ULTRA MEGA PUMP to 100$+

61998866
>>61998660
Yes. Yes it is

61999089
>>61998866
Did you buy?

62000247
>>61999089
Of course. 100 DOT holder reporting in

62000433
>>62000247
It's over guys. This guy doomed us. Because he bought it's going to 0$. Please sell before I put my DOT into my cars brakes.

62004150
>>62000247
The moment you bough the whole market started dumping.

62007000
100$ end of bull run. Is it possible to keep the thread alive for 1 full month? 15 days to go!

62007009
How much are they paying you jeets to post here?

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

62010139
So... When's JAM coming out guys? Those fuckers stopped doing the monthly development calls

62010191
>>62010139
If you're not a bot, here's a question: why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.

62010262
>>62010191
I'm really glad you brought that up anon. Great question! And if I want to answer it properly, like you deserve, my good sar, then I'll need a bit more information
>why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.
What do you mean by constantly humiliate myself? Can you help me understand that

62011878
100$ end of bull run

62014468
You did notice that the activity is actually up by a large % since Acurast launched their corechains (https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily), right guys?

62014587
>>62010191
False rumor about Gavin

62015928
>>62014587
Don't lie. Why do you think they call him WOOD? And he literally looks like a 7yo boy pedo, just look at him. If I googled "Pedophile" then Gavins picture would probably be #2, right after Epstein. And since we're talking about Epstein... Gavin and Epstein were partying all the time together.

62016012
>>62015928
Oh shit. You are a bot

62016043
>>62016012
Could a bot post pictures of his hands with a timestamp? Like I did here; >>62008295 ??? Makes no sense, right?

62016887
>>62016043
So are you for DOT or not

62016901
>>62016887
What do you mean by FOR? Could you define that a little bit more?

62016960
>>61932834
How does a thread with only 94 posts from 20 days ago exist? Dot fag must be bumping it everyday when it hits page 10.

62016999
>>62016960
Read this >>62007000
Also. This is now a DOT board. /biz/ was always a DOT board

62019865
100$ end of bull run

62019872
>>62019865
75

62020329
>>62019872
Dear Punjabista Rajakesh

We talked about this. I first write 100$ and then after it reaches the 9th page you bump the thread and you write 75$. Don't bump the thread before that or Gavin won't pay us DOT for shilling this project.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62021618
>>62016901
What's so hard to understand? Do you support the project?

62023262
>>62021618
>Do you support the project?
In what way? I don't support every decision of the project I guess... But as a whole I really do believe it's the one of the ONLY cryptos worth while. The thing is... Most people don't care about decentralization as a whole and that's why the sector is, in a sense, going under. People got to greedy and lost their roots. Everyone just wants a quick x100 meme coin and that's a big part of the reason there literally was no bull run outside of BTC and a few select meme scam coins. People always destroy everything. It just is how it is. The thing is though. People won't be able to ignore DOT forever. It is what ETH literally wants to be. It has EVERYTHING ETH wants to have in the next 10-15 year. And JAM will probably hit some time this year.

item.title: THIS RETARD IS NEVER RIGHT LMAO HOW THE FUCK DOES HE DO IT I AM REALLY FUCKING BORN IN THE WRONG COUNTRY IF A RETARD LIK… — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
THIS RETARD IS NEVER RIGHT LMAO HOW THE FUCK DOES HE DO IT I AM REALLY FUCKING BORN IN THE WRONG COUNTRY IF A RETARD LIK…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-23 21:47 UTC

OP

THIS RETARD IS NEVER RIGHT LMAO

HOW THE FUCK DOES HE DO IT

I AM REALLY FUCKING BORN IN THE WRONG COUNTRY IF A RETARD LIKE THIS IS A MULTI MILLIONAIRE

Early replies (first 3)

62023019
He was early with bitcoin, created bitmex and is a billionaire
I agree with the rest

62023037
>>62023019
ALSO PLEASE REFRAIN FROM LINKING HIS MENTAL CAPABILITIES TO HIS RACE. WE AREN'T RACISTS ON /BIZ/

62023048
his advice is obviously not meant for poortards like you, only people who can afford to play and lose, so you are the retard for blindly following it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62023088
>>62023019
this.
He actually wan't even that early, he didn't get into bitcoin until 2013, and he found a way to arb BTC between china and singapore, he was literally buying in singapore, selling on a chinese exchange, going to china, taking cash out of bank, then going back to singapore, deposting in bank, repeat.
This was major commitment, but he made millions just doing this.
then he created bitmex and HE created the thing we all know as a PERP. Its actually his invention which is pretty insane.
now all his calls are bad, i don't think he has been right on any call in years.

62023316
>>62023012
He takes the opposite trade of what he says.

62023338
>>62023012
He's the only reason I am not buying HYPE.

62023415
>>62023012
he made his gorillions as an entrepreneur being at the right place at the right time i.e. Creating a successful product and exchange (he pioneered perpetual contracts).

That being said, you can't blindly follow someone in on XYZ just because he was successful doing ABC.

He can afford to be wrong, but he also has demonstrated to be just another retard like you and me when it comes to investing.

Just like rich dad poor dad guy that made his millions out of selling a book, get it now?

62023587
>>62023088
>HE created the thing we all know as a PERP. Its actually his invention which is pretty insane.
Perpetuals were invented in an academic paper years prior; BitMEX just had the first practical implementation

62023672
>>62023107
>>62023316
This..also, to be fair, you need a really high iq to understand his posts.

item.title: Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now? — 32 replies — 24.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now?

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-03-23 20:36 UTC

OP

Are normies right, is it better to flex and enjoy life now?

Just met an old friend who was wearing a Canada Goose jacket and driving a BMW. But he told me he works in a shitty job and lives paycheck to paycheck but he seems happier than me who saves like a scrooge.

Early replies (first 3)

62019001
>>>/fa/ggot

62019013
>>62018960
Luxury cars aren't super expensive if they're more than 5-10 years old. People get too hung up on the make of a car instead of the year. People financing a 2020 subaru are spending more than people buying a used 2015 BMW.

62019020
>>62019013
you gotta luxurymax and go buy some confiscated drug dealer's bentley gt for like 20k. that's stealth wealth while still making retarded/wise financial decisions.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62019021
You'll regret it either way. Such is life

62019083
>>62018960
Imagine the smell, sharp pungent notes of onion with middle layers of exotic French cheese, with decadent wafts of Coco Chanel

62019095
Once both you and him are 60 years old with sore bones and failing health you'll be happier than him because you'll be able to afford to do things and he'll still be working a shitty job.

You'll look back on the time when you and him were young and healthy and you'll think "man, he was stupid, I'm glad I spent my youth working hard so I can finally enjoy my life"

62019107
>>62019013
You can get the entire engine resealed on a Subaru for the cost of 3 oil changes on the BMW. Buying a European car is like buying a luxury dog, the upfront cost is peanuts compared to maintenance.

62019112
>>62018960
I save like a scrooge because I enjoy sitting on a park bench or on the beach, which is cheap as fuck.

62019230
>>62019095
This except when I’m 40yo instead of 60yo

62019232
>>62019112
I recommend gardening. Not a joke. It's extremely satisfying.

62019600
>>62019232
Been there, done that. Too lazy. I love sun bathing though.

62020099
>>62020006
I'm in this picture and I don't like it.

62020262
>>62019600
>I love cancer rays

>>62019232
>I recommend poking around in the dirt

62020300
I actually dated a huge titted blond girl who looked like straight out of hentai manga and she had a master’s on fashion. She chose cheaper off-brand clothes for me that actually fitted me really well and made me look good. Really made me realise how much of a cope branded fashion is when even 10/10s would rather have their men wear cheaper clothing that actually fits them really well.

62020323
>>62019095
My dad felt like a depressed bum when he was forced to retire at 68 (law for teachers). Maybe if you’re some outcast loser, you won’t want to stay healthy and work as long as possible.

62020377
>>62019095
Life in your 60s is not as enjoyable though. Most oldfags regret not having enjoyed their youth more.
Also, most people that focus on saving end up with way more money than they actually need and start giving it out to their kids and grandkids. When you are in your 20s and 30s life seems way more expensive than it actually is because of the house, but once it is paid off, you can live comfortably on a near poverty level income unless you are really bug unto travelling and shit.

62020392
>perpetual poverty because you keep buying things you can’t afford to make people think you’re rich

Yeah OP, that does sound like a great idea. Go for it.

62020396
>>62020377
When you're old you'll be spending a lot on your health though

62020625
>>62020006
>>62020099
Raymond Thoughts and Mind
Hang in there and find God and a hobby.

62020691
>>62020625
that guy is fucking all levels of pathetic

62020694
>>62020396
No I won't
>t. EU
But even then it is still not as much as people think. Also, if you have kids they will surely chip in unless they hate your guts and, if you don't have them, you might as well just accept death if you get diagnosed with a gigacancer or somethibg like that when you are old. Serious health issues will leave you so fucked up that
Both my grandpas went through long cancer treatments and both said that they wouldn't have agreed to getting treated if they didn't have a family they still wanted to watch grow for a bit longer. One of them even refused treatment the second time he got diagnosed in his late 70s because the ammount of suffering to just lengthen his years of decaying health a bit more was just not worth it. Ironically enough the cancer spread slower than anticipated and he made it into his early 80s.
You only really need big money at those ages if your health is going to shit, but those ages are only really enjoyable if your health stays good.
Staying active and sleeping properly are probably better retirement plans than saving big yet people focus on the latter because of how capitalized and monetized our culture has become and our fixation on extending lifespans while disregarding the quality of those years.

62020699
>>62020694
>Serious health issues will leave you so fucked up that
Continuing to live for no particular reason stops being worth it*

62020724
>>62020691
For sure. That image is literally him.

62022513
>>62020625
>Find God
Then why'd not recommend the Bible?

62022923
>>62020694
>heh I won't have any serious issues until I'm 70
You're in for a surprise

62022954
>>62020300
Pics

62023185
>>62020262
>timmy problems
Sorry saar. Next time be born indian.

62023233
I plan to loan Max and just figure out ways to max out credit cards when I'm at that age. What they gonna do? Put me in jail at 75 when I'm about to die. Cool free housing. Idgaf

62023259
FIRE and Dave Ramsey type shit is kind of a meme. There's no point to spending $0 until you're 60 and wasting your younger years being a bum for no reason
However if you ball too hard you'll be a broke bitch when you're 60, which would also suck. So you should have some kind of balance. Think about what's actually worth spending money on.

62023318
>>62018960
>met an old friend who was wearing a Canada Goose jacket and driving a BMW
the real world sounds really crazy
>my old friend wears a jacket and drives a car, should I do the same to seem happier?
lol
if you're asking questions like these, the golemification is nearing its completion, you have bigger issues than having a less expensive car than another golem

62023458
>>62019020
>buy some confiscated drug dealer's bentley gt for like 20k
Is that actually possible?

item.title: >MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS — 68 replies — 17.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS

Open thread • Replies: 68 • Updated: 2026-03-23 17:54 UTC

OP

>MFW BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS SINCE THEIR ENTIRE SOCIETY IN DEPENDENT ON CARS

Early replies (first 3)

62011346
This kills the burger

62011349
$5 for gas where I am at. Probably going to get worse. Feels fucking bad man

62011356
>>62011349
7.50 dollars a gallon where I'm at, and after tip it's closer to 9.50.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62017466
>>62015115
I'm sorry that a little sweat, sun, and rain is such a hardship for your delicate skin

62017470
>>62011654
A BYD car in Israel survived a missile strike. All passengers survived, and the car did not even catch on fire

62017481
>>62015052
People don't get stabbed on public transport in europe.

62017502
>>62011291
All that's going to happen is a major recession and Republicans getting completely wiped out in November. Perhaps to never recover again, though I wouldn't bet on it

62017505
>>62015074
>having to ride a bike when you can listen to whatever music you like blazing loud (aftermarket stereo in my car, expensive but worth it)
>not at direct risk of niggers/arabs attacking me, secret wpns in my car when needed
>perfect weather control
>fragrant cuz of air fresheners
look, its nice you're getting exercise, but its hot where i live, and i don't want to smell in the workplace. Cars are unfathomably based.

62017509
>>62017470
its important that the batteries don't get breached, this is a scenario where the batteries being on the bottom of the car helped alot i guess.

That being said, even a fragment of a land mine hitting an EV=quick death.

62017511
>>62011291
Water you on about? Gas is still like a considerably cheaper than when Sleepy Joe was in office. It's really not that expensive at all.

62017512
having your entire country rely on commodity prices is 3rd world shit. America is a 3rd world country. If gas prices go up their entire economy folds like a cart house

62017518
>>62017512
Then why does the rest of the world crash every time we do?

62017618
>>62017518
2008 was way milder in europe.

62017761
>>62011380
this will break half of america plus everything else will tick up oil <60/b really makes you wonder why inflation wasnt squashed its the interest rates

62017814
>>62011404
I have an electric bmw, but I only drive like once a week because I live in a neighborhood where I can walk everywhere and I’m constantly high or drunk lol

62018404
>>62011291
ICE cars, no less kek
>EVs bad!! you must consoom oil, goy

62018429
I like to keep 100 gallons on hand just in case

62018433
>>62011404
EVChuds WON

ICEssies on suicide watch :(

62018438
>>62011600
>>62011654
>>62017470
>>62017509
it's not only the batteries being made using a tech that is harder to burn (LFP), but also BYD batteries are designed to avoid/suppress fires

>>62011710
>>62011722
kek

62018457
>>62011349
bet u brag about your high salary though

62018523
>>62018404
Haha yeah EVs, which run on what...

62018543
>>62018523
what are you trying to say here? they run on electrical energy collected from the sun and stored in batteries.

62019367
>>62011291
>BURGERS HAVE TO RATION THEIR GAS
Thats news to me man and I live in California
5.25 Gas for me if anyone is wondering

62021710
>>62018543
8 years and those batteries are 50% capacity at best or less and need to be 'recycled', which means incinerated and dumped in a toxic waste dump.

62021754
>>62021710
>8 years and those batteries are 50% capacity at best

62021918
>>62017470
>boils your dog

62022004
>>62021710
8 years and 50% of your gas car gets rear ended by shitbox nissan altimas going 30mph over the speed limit

62022307
>>62015074
I have a surprise for you. I live in America and I own a car AND a bicycle! Imagine that! I get to choose which I use and when. To be honest, I LOVE the Japanese rail system. But Americans are selfish pigs and can't have anything that nice without ruining it. Also America is bigger than you can imagine and a national rail system anything like the Japanese system would be unaffordable.

62022408
>>62022307
>But Americans are selfish pigs and can't have anything that nice without ruining it.

>>62021754
a tesla cultist who bought it when it was all the meme-hype and still posts on the fucking tesla forums of all places? frankly i struggle to believe anything he says, but only charging to 80-90% does help alot with longevity for lithium batteries. Dudes probably a silicon valley ceo and parks it underground at work.

62022499
>>62011291
>>62011346
There is no need for rationing, just let the price free.
This causes the demand to go lower, only those who essential need gas are going to buy it.
$50 per gallon would make the world a better place.

62022561
>>62022307
nigger we did a national rail system a century ago but the railroad lobby was butting heads with the oil lobby and guess who won

don't give me bullshit about "affordability", there are lobbyists at play here defending the means of transportation which most efficiently extracts wealth from you

every argument you have FOR our hellscape highway system came straight from an Exxon-funded thinktank and was disseminated by an JIDF bot farm

62022746
>in yurop we aren't even allowed to have cars innit! We just ride da trolly wif mudslimes and niggers! EUROPEAN SUPREMACY!

BASED

62022776
>>62011349
I voted for this

62023264
>>62023245

I have a 100% approval rating, maybe even 200%, they've never seen numbers this high before" as videos of American soldiers being hunted by FPV drones circulate the internet. I want everything to constantly pump and dump and everyone to be financially ruined as the food runs out. FUCK YOU.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62023276
>>62023242

62023284

62023291

62023306

>can't defeat a minor enemy much weaker than you
>learn nothing from Russia's mistakes

62023370

>>62023352
Warfare technology and methods have advanced and democratized so much that some pissed off engineers in caves can make themselves a serious stumbling block to the most inefficent and sloe-moving fighting force in the world.

62023374
>>62023352
usa and israel is a meme

62023380
>>62023276
They did, except to Lebanon. They're invading it right now

62023382
>>62023352
/k/ cannot answer, they are still observing their 7 day mourning period from the f35

62023385
>>62023309
lol larping as some kind of hardened badass on 4chan

62023388
>>62023370
>Warfare technology and methods have advanced and democratized so much that some pissed off engineers in caves can make themselves a serious stumbling block to the most inefficent and sloe-moving fighting force in the world.
And how did US not realize that after 4 years of Ukraine where cheap ass drones are more important than battleships and tanks?

62023392
>>62023352

>grift
>scams
>theft
>black book shit like UAP legacy programs

62023394
>>62023388
Our leaders and planners are niggers

62023396
>>62023352

>start a completely optional war after leaving a perfectly good nuclear agreement you yourself started
>>62023370
>the most inefficent and sloe-moving fighting force in the world
I thought the US was supposed to be the opposite of these, in spite of its size.

62023403
>>62023396
Why would you think that? The high water mark for the US .mil was Gulf War 1. Even GWOT wasn't as well-organized.

62023419
>>62023403
Desert Storm/gulf war 1 wasn't that long ago though. What changed between then and now that the US can't do the same thing? Politics?

62023422
>>62023242
>talks fall through again
Huh?
>June/July '25
>Isreal strikes first
>Iran defends itself
>US attacks to "defend" Isreal
>Demands ceasefire, Iran agrees

>Feb/Mar '26
>Isreal attacks first
>America "defends" Isreal
>Demand ceasefire, Iran agrees under condition Isreal stops being a shitstain
>America refuses
What talks fell through? Iran is ironically the most reasonable country here.
And that's before talking about how Isreal has been actively attacking their neighbors unprovoked for decades. Why is no one talking about the invasion of Lebanon which has been ongoing since 2023?

At least /biz/ showed me how to gamble on it and how predictable it is.

>>62023352
>>Apparently have not changed tactics and strategy to deal with non conventional warfare even after Iraq, Afghanistan, and Vietnam
Another inevitable loss that we'll frame as a win.

62023441
>>62023242

Do people actually follow this retard?

item.title: Groyper — 17 replies — 15.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Groyper

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-23 20:48 UTC

OP

Been digging through archives on the Groyper meme. Oldfags who were around, drop any extra details or corrections pls.

2015: First known use of the word. February 28, Big Dog Groyper drops the term on /r9k/

2016: First known image. March 25. The smug fat toad with the iconic pose debuts on /v/

2017: An anon /pol/ post mentions Groyper is a toad and friend of Pepe. Later a Wojak version appears, and different Groyper variations spread on Reddit and Twitter as the default smug reaction. That_groyper Twitter account launches and posts exploitables.

Late 2010s–early 2020s. Fully adopted by the Fuentes crowd, becomes mascot for the e-right and later the Groyper Army.

2023. Same toad used for the first memecoin on TON, oldest living Groyper in crypto. Still active and updating in March 2026, longest-running by far.

Other Groypers appear on different chains. ETH, Sol, Base, Pulse etc. ETH version hit 20mil ATH, but it's quiet now. Sol one is the only other that's kinda still alive, but barely.

2025. Financial Times names "Groyper" word of the year. Ties it to ultra-right youth wave. NYT throws it in top phrases and lists too.

2026. The TON original pulled way ahead: active community, TON DeFi superapp groypfi.io Telegram trading bot, perps, AI agent, NFT/Gifts market, Groypad launchpad with biggest creator fees on TON.

From random 4chan post to the headlines to real DeFi tools on Telegram chain. Wild arc.

Anything I missed?

Early replies (first 3)

62020304
How do I profit from this?

62020427
>>62020286
Can someone explain to me the point of TON if telegram introduced stars to oblige the app stores? Been trying to wrap my head around that business decision ever since it came out

62020467
Easter?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62020622
>>62020427
>>62020427
Telegram is owned by jewish Pavel Durov, who constantly is selling TON to purchase stars. There is currently no value for TON, only massive sell pressure.

62020693
>>62020427

Ton is already used for ads, on the secondary markets for gifts, anon-numbers and usernames, rev-share, mini-apps, easy transfers between users etc. Every tg user has a Ton wallet ready.

Stars are just to comply with the app-stores "no crypto for in-app payments"-rules

Prediction: Telegram IPOs, takes over Ton or "deep integration", and makes a deal to use Ton as the native currency

62020801
>>62020286
His name is Easter the Toad!

I would share my toad folder (800+ unique toads from 2016 /int/), but I feel extremely insulted that you call that word.

62020824
Easter the Toad

62020937
>>62020801
Interesting. Don't feel insulted, I asked for oldfag's wisdom

62020956
>>62020622
>jewish is when you stand up to multiple ZOGs and risk your life for free speech

62021317
>>62020956
Fair enough point. Still doesn't change the fact that TON was once $8 and has dropped like a rock to barely $1.30.

62021526
How do I profit off of my esoteric groyphair knowledge?

This is right up my alley since I only want to invest in based things

62021684
>>62021526
>>62020304

Groyp on Ton nfadyor

62022364
wtf is easter the toad. groyper is toad king

62023234
Checked their X, LMAO
Looks like the TON Groypers are taking their job very seriously

62023471
Yea, not a shitcoin. A whole defi empire, and only 200k cap. Their launchpad gonna take over Ton

62023490
>>62020622
>Pavel Durov
>Jewish

Lol.

item.title: >online dating is the future of lo-ACK! — 70 replies — 14.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Open thread • Replies: 70 • Updated: 2026-03-23 16:59 UTC

OP

>online dating is the future of lo-ACK!

Early replies (first 3)

62017513
>>62017496
We already had this thread. Bumble is merely a lesson in why women are retarded.

62017539
Its was just a way to spread stds to a control group of retards

62017623
>>62017496
Are these dating apps even useable on the free tiers? Any time I install one of these you literally cannot do anything unless you pay them some absurd monthly fee like $29 a month. Who actually pays for this crap?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62019100
>>62017496
Bumble must be the best dating app. it's too good for its own good

>>62018172
this, and also obviously their best paying customers are people who have above average paying jobs, so mostly 25+ years old, and, unlike teenagers, most of them will be looking for long term partners.

62019110
>>62017496
>Have women make the first move
>Go out of business
Epitome of go woke, go broke

62019130
>>62018489
They're not even unlimited, you just get more. It's worth it if you're abroad though. I got a lot of action when I went to Brazil.

62019131
>>62019069
The fact that you think this kind of humblebragging is subtle in any way is proof that you're probably in the high 90s, low 100s at best.

62019161
>>62019131
Sounds like a lot of projection coming from you. It wasn’t humble bragging, just stating facts as best I know them. Comp sci major. I was into Apple stock in 2007, bitcoin in 2013, monero in 2015. I created one of the first nfts in existence. I tend to be ahead of the curve. But I also haven’t made any meaningful coding contributions to those projects, like the real 150iq people have. So I figure that puts me at around 130.

I’m sorry that makes you seethe uncontrollably. Maybe some more sex tourism will help with that.

62019168
Wish they had a mode that made it easier to anonymously find slam piggies to hook up with after they match you with a fat slam piggies to date

62019170
>>62017496
>Dating
Why? Just make money and move on.

62019184
>>62017733
he isnt wrong. im no chad

i just pay for platinum and the spotlight feature.

buy a plane ticket to a city with millions of people. anywhere on earth.

take photos on portrait mode on an iphone with 3x zoom.

get laid same day.

pic related .

travel, get new perspective on life get laid. why buy a car when you can buy an experiences

this is not a paid ad for tinder platinum.

yea she is 18 and i am 36. im no chad and no doctor.

62019188
>>62017496
I got laid numerous times thanks to OkCupid around the 2010's but after Match bought them and every single other dating app they've become a place for whores to shill their onlyfans

62019189
>>62017656
This

And then ((((((Match))))) bought every single dating app and made them unusable

62019192
>>62019188
Zoomers will never know the fertile plains of pussy that were Tinder circa 2013 - 2015. If you were white and vaguely in shape you could sleep with someone new every week with minimal effort.

62019289
>>62019184
>yea she is 18
>that ring
-_-

62019707
>>62017765
If you haven’t realised by now that (the sexual part of) abrahamic religions is just a two thousand year old incel cope, maybe it was always over for you.

62019711
>>62018215
Go see a doctor, you need schizophrenia meds.

62019720
>>62018879
Wtf are you saying relationships don’t always work out?! I have aproached a woman just one time during my entire life but i know the relationship dynamics of humans fully and can say that there would be a dream virgin trad wife with endless romantic and erotic love waiting for us all men if it just wasn’t for those darn jews!

62019725
>>62019131
Kek mistaking you being annoyed when other people openly talk about their romantic success with ”bad manners” just proves what an un-self concious midwit you are. Funny how it’s always mid intelligence people calling other people low iq because they can’t see their own stupidity.

62021049
>>62019289
they sell jewelry at the mall, sperg-kun

62021064
>>62019130
>Brazil
How big were the girl's cocks?

62021075
>>62017623
it's worth it if you're an attractive man and you don't want to swipe a million times for the algo to give you something worth looking at. got my current gf from tinder and I paid for it & I didn't think she would even respond to my message

62021174
>>62017623
Matching apps suck.
Only viable model for avg giy was being able to fire off a message (online approach) to any chick currently online.

You'd be surprised how many guys will pull out there wallet to not even get pussy.

62021180
>>62021174
Needing the woman to pre-approve you talking to her has been a disaster

62021193
Serious advice to all the kids that browse biz. If you're a man that wants a missus and kids, hurry up. Don't listen to those who say "you still have time". You don't wanna get into your 30s single. It's horrible. I've seen horrors like you wouldn't believe. +30 yo females that start crying during the date. They're all fucked up in the head.

62021294
>>62018489
Anon Spain is the kind of place where it is male locals fucking female tourists, not the other way around. It's been that way for decades.
For your needs it is latin america and south east asia that you should be visiting.

62021356
>>62017496
>making a dating app that require women to take the initiative
yeah no shit

62021380
>>62018101

>>62019087
You all are just jealous

62021435
>>62017496
They got greedy, and it's all full of scammers.

62021478
>>62017623
I used Bumble free and I married a girl I met on there.
2 kids as well.
These apps just match you to actual people. I don't understand the seethe, unless you're ugly of course.

62021549
>>62017496

Woah

62021571
>>62021478

62022431

62020245

62020361
>>62020044
the us always has her military to back her debt.
just don't think about how utterly incapable of winning wars evem against the most backwards of enemies they are.

62020374
>>62020044
And why is that my problem?

62020436
>>62020044
>64 trillion
>that's 25 trillion in 10 years
Holy shit the USA is just going to go "lol I'm not paying for that shit" one of these days and crash the global economy harder than the Bronze Age Collapse.

62020555
>>62020044
Those are some rookie numbers.
Japan's debt to GDP ratio is 237%. Us is only at 128%

62020581
>>62020090

62020616

62020654

62020814
>>62020361

62021427
>>62020436
>the USA is just going to go "lol I'm not paying for that shit" one of these days and crash the global economy
guess which banks and pension funds are the most exposed to US bonds
it's like you guys don't have access to the internet sometimes, but somehow found a way to broadcast your retarded post into here

it's amazing how you were able to get past the captcha

62021448
>>62020361

>her military

You mean the sheboons mutinying and clogging toilets and setting shit on fire?

62021561
>>62020044
Stop being a bitch and make the debt ceiling at 50 gazillion. Problem solved, you are welcome.

62021659
>>62020044

62021695

62023423

62023427

item.title: >world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??! — 73 replies — 11.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
>world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!

Open thread • Replies: 73 • Updated: 2026-03-23 15:22 UTC

OP

>world go bad gold must always go up
>WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!
Is the most brain dead retarded take imaginable. These retards fail to understand the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.

Early replies (first 3)

62006969
>>62006961
These are the same type of people who bought gamestop btw.

62006976
>>62006969
digits... checked

62006979
>>62006961
Probably a horde of cunts started leveraging themselves long up the ass when the war started.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62012611
>>62012210
CNBC are disingenuous and intentionally ignore how the political instability and the need unwind leverage are the reason gold is being sold.

62012673
>>62006961
>cash out all your gold
>yolo into oil
It's retarded but it works. They're probably overleveraged to shit on paper trades

62015367
Orange Man Bad about to turn off Iran's lights
BTC shits the bed like gold did
>the only real inflation hedge has always been bullets after all

62015386
>>62006961
I bought back in 2023. I'm not worried

62015392
>>62006961
gold drops when people know there wont be a rebuilding phase after an apocalypse

62015545
>>62006961
No. I will never buy your useless rocks, retard.

62015709
Price is malleable. Supply is not.

62015716
>>62006961
It doesn’t have to go up.all they have to do is make it unobtainable for normies.
Most normies can barely afford to fill their gas tanks or spend close to as much as the use to a year ago.what make you think they could afford to buy a shiny rock at current prices?

62015768
it's arabs selling their gold because they need cash since they can't reliably sell their oil

62015770
>>62007829
>Anon is jealous of
>>62006969
>Digits

62015784
>>62006961
Because when shtf people sell gold first to pay to have it cleaned up.

62016992
>>62006961
Gold is up 4% YTD. In the next two years we will see >7000$ Gold. Inflation and the decline of the World Reserve currency just started

62017010
>>62006961
>why is a shiny rock with no use case crashing?!
Truly a mystery.

62017033
>>62006961
When it hits six hundred dollars again I am buying and hodling

62017090
>>62006961
>the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.
which has almost no weight to the actual price

62017143
>>62006990
Give it a minute, wait until WW3 before selling.

62017279
>>62007712
I look like this actually

62018771
>>62017090
correct
the price of gold has been tied for the most part to a generation of useful idiots that have become a net negative cashflow this year and recently to the PBC and Bank id Russia having tried the most desperate re-hypothecation scam ever on the planet

62018796
>>62006961
>world go bad
>you have lot of money
gold go up
>world go bad
>while you can't sell oil for money and now need to buy food buy selling gold
gold go down

Iran middleast has back channels for selling. Gold might go further down when they sell gold to buy water. Desalination plants are next on the list

62018972
>>62006961
I can explain this phenomenon.
The thing is, gold is crashing BECAUSE it is considered one of the safest assets . Gold is being used as a COLLATERAL for debt.
But now the economy of THE ENTIRE PLANET is in the shitter thanks to jewish demons and orange man the jewish slave (I hate them so fucking much), people NEED MONEY to pay for living and debt, so they're selling gold. this triggers price decrease which triggers MARGIN CALL, which triggers another round of gold selling and so on.

tldr >>62018796

62018998
>>62018972
This will likely continue until the USD stops being a reliable method of payment globally. Gold and other PMs will become the universal currency between the various new blocs that emerge.

The death of the USD will raise gold prices in USD.

62019039
>>62018998
>USD is going to stop being a reliable currency
that's not going to happen in your or my lifetime

62019046
>>62018972
its safe therefore it crashes first

62019183
>>62006961
I caused this. I just bought 2 ounces of gold from my dad literally yesterday

62019242
>>62006961
The irony is OP is the retard. Imagine gloating over this. Ofc gold has to correct after what it just did.

62019643
>>62006961
>>62007032
Gold is falling largely from the liquidity squeeze in the broader world and middle east. Gold crashing is not proof that there is no risk or that gold is being priced as no longer the risk off, it is the risk materializing into markets and everyone being forced to sell what they have to meet margins/etc. Same happens literally every crash and literally every crash people act shocked and literally every crash gold explodes higher than it crashed from after.
>>62007658
Go back to rebbit.

62019669
>>62019046
Yes because people (and institutions, including nations) need to liquidate SOMETHING to cash out and afford necessities. big portion of that something is gold.

62019773
>>62006961
SELL SELL SELL

62019906
>just hold for another decade goy
bagholder retards, kek

62021844
>>62012210
>inflation means prices go down
>war is peace
>it's true until everything the people believe is false

item.content:encoded:
GOLD RUGGED

Open thread • Replies: 88 • Updated: 2026-03-23 13:05 UTC

OP
